meaning: 加德兹[阿富汗东部城市]
examples: A second set up illegal checkpoints to collects tolls around Gardez.
They can be a great contribution to the peace, security, and stability of Gardez.
He looked younger than I'd expected, too young to be the potentate of Gardez.
Audin's men were further restricted and forbidden from any contact with the Gardez shop owners.
